nodes.name: candidate-playbook.md
nodes.summary: Evidence-backed skill amendment playbook for the evaluator-rag prototype, defining the accepted and rejected paths for proposing skill/agent/command changes, and listing minimum validation gates (CI scripts, lint, regression tests) required before promotion.

nodes.name: report.json
nodes.summary: Evaluator-rag prototype run report for the skill-quality-evidence scenario, recording dimension scores (skill contract retrieval, observed failure evidence, example quality, etc.) and findings with a recommended next action.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses the ecc.evaluator-rag.report.v1 schema; the read_only flag signals this artifact must not be mutated by the evaluator run itself.

nodes.name: scenario.json
nodes.summary: Evaluator-rag scenario definition for skill-quality-evidence, specifying the objective, retrieval sources (skill-development guide, CI validation scripts, regression tests), retrieval questions, forbidden actions, and acceptance gates.

nodes.name: trace.json
nodes.summary: Execution trace for the skill-quality-evidence evaluator-rag prototype run, recording each phase (observation, retrieval, proposal, verification, promotion) with evidence references and candidate decisions.
nodes.languageNotes: The events array captures ordered phases of the evaluator lifecycle; evidence fields reference repo paths and test commands used during retrieval.

nodes.name: verifier-result.json
nodes.summary: Verifier output for the skill-quality-evidence prototype run, containing per-candidate accept/reject decisions with scores, reasoning, and rollback instructions; promotes evidence-backed-skill-amendment and rejects the vague-skill-rewrite candidate.
